results.title: Dodgers 4, Twins 3: A sweep secured after the Dodgers brush aside early drama by closing with 7 scoreless from Shohei Ohtani and the pen
results.description: After taking the first two games, the Dodgers went for a sweep of the Twins behind Shohei Ohtani on double duty again, and there were a surprising amount of early fireworks given that Joe Ryan was on the other side. Thankfully, the Dodgers trudged through some drama between batterymates and managed to score one more ...

results.title: Astros edge Blue Jays after Jeff Hoffman's 8th-inning error
results.description: The visiting Houston Astros scored the go-ahead run in the eighth inning on an errant pickoff attempt Wednesday night to defeat the Toronto Blue Jays

results.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Neymar makes long-awaited return for Brazil, features in his 4th World Cup
results.description: The injury ruled him out for an extended period and limited his involvement in Brazil's qualification campaign. The post FIFA World Cup 2026: Neymar makes long-awaited return for Brazil, features in his 4th World Cup appeared first on Northeast Live .

results.title: Terrifying moment 7.2 earthquake in Venezuela rocks baseball game in Caracas
results.description: The frightening power of the 7.1-magnitude earthquake that struck Caracas, Venezuela on Wednesday was on full display during the first inning of a baseball game.
